- No hooks configured: tool call is observed, then allowed.
  - `src/session-runtime/session-hooks.mjs:10` `attachSessionHooks()` installs `session.beforeToolHook`; line `14` invokes `hooks.beforeTool(...)`.
  - `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/loop/tool-exec.mjs:53` `executeTool()` gets that hook at `84-86` and awaits it at `90-98`.
  - With no configured rules, `src/standalone/hook-bus.mjs:437` `beforeTool()` emits `tool:before` at `439-444`, finds no blocking PreToolUse handler/rule, then returns `null` at `473`.
  - The “observer mode” status text is explicit at `src/standalone/hook-bus.mjs:552-558`: no hook rules => lifecycle/tool events recorded in observer mode.

- Why `null` happens:
  - `src/standalone/hook-bus.mjs:187-191` `selectHandlers()` returns `[]` when there is no standard hook config.
  - `src/standalone/hook-bus.mjs:116-120` `loadRules()` returns `[]` when no hooks file exists.
  - Then `beforeTool()` finds no rule and returns `null` (`465-473`).

- If a hook denies instead:
  - Standard `PreToolUse` handler: `src/standalone/hook-bus/handlers.mjs:495` `parseHandlerOutput()` marks block on exit code `2` (`509-514`) or `hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision: "deny"` (`548-564`).
  - `src/standalone/hook-bus.mjs:265` `runEventHandlers()` copies that to `agg.blocked` (`303-316`).
  - `src/standalone/hook-bus.mjs:437` `beforeTool()` returns `{ action: 'deny', reason }` at `451-453`.
  - Legacy rule path: `src/standalone/hook-bus/rules.mjs:29` `decisionFromRule()` maps `deny`/`block` to `{ action: 'deny' }` at `31-33`; `beforeTool()` returns that decision at `474-486`.
  - `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/loop/tool-exec.mjs:99-102` turns deny/block into `Error: tool "<name>" denied by hook...`, so the tool body does not run.

- Tool execution entry points verified:
  - Serial path: `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/tool-batch.mjs:284` calls `executeTool()`.
  - Eager read-only path: `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/eager-dispatch.mjs:93` also calls `executeTool()`.

Verification: read/code_graph only; no files modified, no shell run.

- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/agent-trace.mjs:27` `extractCachedTokens(usage)`

- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/providers/openai-oauth-http-sse.mjs:70` `_extractCachedTokens(usage)`
  - Reads `input_tokens_details` / `prompt_tokens_details` / `usage.cached_tokens`; assigned into `cachedTokens` at `:613`.
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/providers/openai-compat-trace.mjs:42` `extractCompatCachedTokens(usage)`
  - Reads `prompt_tokens_details.cached_tokens`, `input_tokens_details.cached_tokens`, `prompt_cache_hit_tokens`, `cached_prompt_text_tokens`.

  - `cache_creation_input_tokens` stored as `usage.cacheWriteTokens`.

Flow into records/metrics:

  - Canonical field is `cachedTokens`.
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/loop/usage.mjs:19` `addUsage(total, usage)`

- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/agent-loop.mjs:542`

  - Maps `response.usage.cachedTokens` → `deltaCachedRead` at `:558`.
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/manager/ask-session.mjs:328`

- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/manager/usage-metrics.mjs:285` `persistIterationMetrics(delta)`
  - Persists `deltaCachedRead` into `session.totalCachedReadTokens` at `:315`.
  - Updates `session.lastCachedReadTokens` at `:323`.
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/manager/usage-metrics.mjs:240` `applyAskTerminalUsageTotals(...)`

- UI surfacing:

  - `src/tui/engine/session-stats.mjs:27` same for TUI stats.

No edits.

Auto pre-send compaction trigger:
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/agent-loop.mjs:372` `agentLoop()` calls `runPreSendCompactPass()` before every provider send.
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/pre-send-compact.mjs:34` `runPreSendCompactPass()`
  - builds policy via `resolveWorkerCompactPolicy()` at `:40`
  - estimates transcript tokens at `:62`
  - computes trigger with `shouldCompactForSession()` at `:64`
  - if true, enters compaction at `:83`
  - then dispatches to:
    - `runRecallFastTrackCompact()` at `:127` for recall-fasttrack sessions
    - `semanticCompactMessages()` at `:152` for semantic sessions

Trigger condition:
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/loop/compact-policy.mjs:155` `shouldCompactForSession()`
  - false if no auto policy/boundary
  - true if reactive overflow retry
  - true if token estimate is unavailable
  - otherwise: `messageTokensEst + reserveTokens >= triggerTokens` (`:159`, helper at `:136`)

Threshold decision/source of truth:
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/context-utils.mjs:244` `resolveSessionCompactPolicy()`
  - explicit sub-boundary `autoCompactTokenLimit` wins (`:255-260`)
  - agent-owned semantic sessions trigger at `boundary - buffer` (`:260-262`)
  - main/user recall-fasttrack sessions trigger at the boundary (`:262-264`)
- Default buffer:
  - `DEFAULT_COMPACTION_BUFFER_RATIO = 0.1` in `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/context-utils.mjs:103`
  - buffer config parsed by `resolveCompactBufferRatio()` at `:138`
  - buffer tokens computed by `resolveCompactBufferTokens()` at `:214`
- `resolveWorkerCompactPolicy()` consumes that policy and exposes `triggerTokens` at `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/loop/compact-policy.mjs:98-123`.

Reactive trigger:
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/send-with-recovery.mjs:108` catches provider context-window overflow.
- If auto compaction is enabled and retry unused, returns `{ action: 'retry' }` at `:121-134`.
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/agent-loop.mjs:461-464` sets `reactiveOverflowRetryPending = true`, loops back.
- Next `runPreSendCompactPass()` forces compaction via `shouldCompactForSession(..., { forceReactive: true })` at `pre-send-compact.mjs:63-64`.

Manual/CRUD entry:
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/manager/session-crud.mjs:218` `compactSessionMessages()` calls `runSessionCompaction(... force: true)` at `:225-232`.
- `src/runtime/agent/orchestrator/session/manager/compaction-runner.mjs:221` `runSessionCompaction()` has its own threshold gate for non-forced auto mode: `pressureTokens < triggerTokens` returns “below threshold” at `:246-254`; forced/manual bypasses that.
